files.raw_diff:
diff --git a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
index a1b2c3d..e5f6g7h 100644
--- a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
+++ b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
@@ -23,10 +23,14 @@
 
 @router.post("/run", status_code=202)
 async def start_run(
     body: PipelineRunRequest,
     background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
 ) -> dict:
     """
     Start a new pipeline run in the background.
     """
+    # Input Validation Guard
+    if not body.diff_text or len(body.diff_text.strip()) < 10:
+        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="diff_text must be at least 10 characters long.")
+        
     orchestrator = PipelineOrchestrator()
     # A temporary orchestration is needed to get the run_id before starting

scenarios.title: Trigger new pipeline run via API
scenarios.description: Verify that a POST request to the pipeline run endpoint initiates a background task and returns a valid run ID.
preconditions: API service is running and accessible
scenarios.expected_result: A 202 Accepted status is returned with a generated UUID and queued status.

scenarios.title: Retrieve list of completed reports
scenarios.description: Verify that the reports endpoint returns a list of all existing pipeline run summaries.
preconditions: At least one pipeline run has been completed and stored on disk
scenarios.expected_result: A JSON array of report summaries containing run_id, label, and status.

scenarios.title: Navigate to specific report details via UI
scenarios.description: Verify that clicking a report ID in the list navigates to the detailed view.
scenarios.expected_result: The UI displays the full execution report details for the selected run ID.

scenarios.title: Submit pipeline run with invalid payload
scenarios.description: Verify that the API returns an error when required fields in PipelineRunRequest are missing.
scenarios.expected_result: Server returns 422 Unprocessable Entity due to validation failure.

scenarios.title: Fetch non-existent report detail
scenarios.description: Verify the system handles requests for report IDs that do not exist on disk.
scenarios.expected_result: API returns a 404 Not Found error.

scenarios.title: Handle empty reports directory
scenarios.description: Verify that the reports list endpoint returns an empty array when no reports exist.
scenarios.expected_result: API returns an empty list gracefully without error.

scenarios.title: Delete report via API
scenarios.description: Verify that a DELETE request removes the report file from the server.
scenarios.expected_result: The report is successfully deleted and no longer retrievable.

scenarios.title: Prevent Path Traversal in report retrieval
scenarios.description: Ensure that the run_id parameter cannot be used to access files outside the reports directory.
scenarios.expected_result: The API rejects the request or returns 404/422, preventing file system traversal.

scenarios.title: Validate concurrent pipeline triggers
scenarios.description: Verify that multiple rapid POST requests to /run generate unique run IDs and do not collide.
scenarios.expected_result: Unique UUIDs are generated for every concurrent request.

generated_specs.content:
import os
import re
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect

BASE_URL = os.environ.get("BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")
REPORTS_API_PATH = "/api/reports"
PIPELINE_RUN_API_PATH = "/api/pipeline/run"

# SCENARIO_ID: a304f9cc-56bf-416b-8982-d825a802164c
def test_trigger_new_pipeline_run_via_api(page: Page):
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest
    pytest.skip("payload model PipelineRunRequest not in context")

# SCENARIO_ID: a39fdf0c-f87e-40ac-97f9-01e030d3b348
def test_retrieve_list_of_completed_reports(page: Page):
    response = page.request.get(f"{BASE_URL}{REPORTS_API_PATH}")
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    
    reports = response.json()
    assert isinstance(reports, list)
    assert len(reports) >= 1, "Expected at least one completed report summary"
    
    first_report = reports[0]
    assert "run_id" in first_report
    assert "status" in first_report

# SCENARIO_ID: ad3cac14-ed26-4039-80f9-df807b0dc5a2
def test_navigate_to_specific_report_details_via_ui(page: Page):
    page.goto(f"{BASE_URL}/reports")
    
    # Use modern locator to find the first report link
    report_link = page.get_by_role("link").first
    expect(report_link).to_be_visible()
    
    report_link.click()
    
    # Verify navigation to a detail URL pattern
    expect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(r".*/reports/[a-zA-Z0-9-]+"))

# SCENARIO_ID: 85b03e1c-6f31-4fad-98d4-2eda35a627f5
def test_submit_pipeline_run_with_invalid_payload(page: Page):
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest
    pytest.skip("payload model PipelineRunRequest not in context")

# SCENARIO_ID: 7afa0c79-8caa-40da-82f2-f9f07623f6b1
def test_fetch_non_existent_report_detail(page: Page):
    invalid_uuid = "invalid-uuid-123"
    response = page.request.get(f"{BASE_URL}{REPORTS_API_PATH}/{invalid_uuid}")
    
    assert response.status == 404

# SCENARIO_ID: e5ed7e70-cd75-42a5-9035-1fe2e0c46502
def test_handle_empty_reports_directory(page: Page):
    # This test assumes a clean environment where no reports exist
    response = page.request.get(f"{BASE_URL}{REPORTS_API_PATH}")
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    
    body = response.json()
    assert body == [], f"Expected empty list, but got {body}"

# SCENARIO_ID: 2de48ecf-7e24-458f-b14c-6c30d8f999d2
def test_delete_report_via_api(page: Page):
    # 1. Retrieve list to find a valid run_id
    list_res = page.request.get(f"{BASE_URL}{REPORTS_API_PATH}")
    reports = list_res.json()
    if not reports:
        pytest.skip("No reports available to perform deletion test")
        
    target_run_id = reports[0]["run_id"]
    report_endpoint = f"{BASE_URL}{REPORTS_API_PATH}/{target_run_id}"
    
    # 2. Perform deletion
    delete_res = page.request.delete(report_endpoint)
    expect(delete_res).to_be_ok()
    
    # 3. Verify report is gone
    verify_res = page.request.get(report_endpoint)
    assert verify_res.status == 404

# SCENARIO_ID: c831d626-200a-4c95-9617-9e81269f9899
def test_prevent_path_traversal_in_report_retrieval(page: Page):
    traversal_path = "../../etc/passwd"
    response = page.request.get(f"{BASE_URL}{REPORTS_API_PATH}/{traversal_path}")
    
    # Ensure the system does not return a 200 for sensitive system files
    assert response.status != 200
    assert response.status in [404, 422, 400]

# SCENARIO_ID: 3028f922-515f-4040-994b-ab99666c0701
def test_validate_concurrent_pipeline_triggers(page: Page):
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest
    pytest.skip("payload model PipelineRunRequest not in context")
